name: Peñascos de los Frailes — circular desde Las Inviernas
region_intro: Hiking around Las Inviernas offers access to varied landscapes, including river valleys, rocky formations, and woodlands. The region is characterized by its natural features, providing diverse settings for outdoor activities. Trails often traverse areas with moderate elevation changes, suitable for different hiking preferences. The terrain supports both shorter excursions and longer, more challenging routes. Best hiking trails around Las Inviernas The most popular hiking route is Peñascos de los Frailes — circular desde Las Inviernas, a 7.3 miles (11.8 km) trail that takes 3 hours 18 minutes to complete. This circular walk explores rocky outcrops and offers views of the surrounding landscape. Another top favourite among local hikers is PR-GU 08: Mandayona - Mirabueno - Aragosa Trail, a moderate 6.4 miles (10.3 km) path. This route connects several villages and features a mix of open terrain and forested sections. Local hikers also love the Pelegrina Castle – Barranco del Río Dulce loop from Aragosa, a 15.2 miles (24.5 km) trail leading through a river gorge and past historical sites, often completed in about 6 hours 31 minutes. Hiking around Las Inviernas is defined by river valleys, rocky formations, and woodlands. The network offers options for different ability levels, from moderate trails to more challenging loops. The routes in Las Inviernas are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.5 stars from over 6 reviews. More than 30 hikers have used komoot to explore Las Inviernas's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on hikes around Las Inviernas?
A: The hiking trails around Las Inviernas feature a diverse landscape, including river valleys, rocky formations, and woodlands. You'll encounter moderate elevation changes, making the area suitable for various hiking preferences, from shorter excursions to more challenging routes.

Q: Are there any circular hiking routes in the Las Inviernas area?
A: Yes, there are several circular routes available. A popular option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1027290918/penascos-de-los-frailes-circular-desde-las-inviernas" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Peñascos de los Frailes — circular desde Las Inviernas&lt;/a&gt;, which is 11.8 km long and takes about 3 hours 18 minutes to complete. Another notable loop is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/31505110" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pelegrina Castle – Barranco del Río Dulce loop from Aragosa&lt;/a&gt;, a longer 24.5 km trail.

Q: Are there any trails that feature waterfalls near Las Inviernas?
A: Yes, you can find trails that lead to waterfalls. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38158111" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Gollorio Waterfall – Pelegrina Castle loop from Torremocha del Campo&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 17.9 km route that includes a waterfall. Another option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/17508100" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cívica Waterfall – Cívica loop from Yela&lt;/a&gt;, which is 13.8 km long and also features a waterfall.

Q: What are some longer, more challenging hikes in the region?
A: For a more challenging experience, consider the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/31505110" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pelegrina Castle – Barranco del Río Dulce loop from Aragosa&lt;/a&gt;. This difficult 24.5 km trail takes approximately 6 hours 31 minutes and leads through a river gorge and past historical sites.

Q: What do other hikers say about the trails around Las Inviernas?
A: The trails in Las Inviernas are highly regarded by the komoot community, with an average rating of 4.5 stars from over 6 reviews. Hikers often praise the varied terrain, which includes river valleys, rocky formations, and woodlands, offering diverse settings for outdoor activities.

Q: Are there any villages or points of interest I can visit along the hiking routes?
A: Yes, some routes connect to or pass by charming villages and points of interest. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1030772735/pr-gu-08-mandayona-mirabueno-aragosa-trail" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;PR-GU 08: Mandayona - Mirabueno - Aragosa Trail&lt;/a&gt; connects several villages. You can also explore attractions like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5855435" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Mandayona Village&lt;/a&gt; or the unique &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5443557" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cívica Rock Dwellings and Waterfall&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: What is the typical duration for hikes in Las Inviernas?
A: Hiking durations vary depending on the route's length and difficulty. For instance, the moderate &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1027290918/penascos-de-los-frailes-circular-desde-las-inviernas" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Peñascos de los Frailes — circular desde Las Inviernas&lt;/a&gt; takes about 3 hours 18 minutes, while the longer &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/31505110" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pelegrina Castle – Barranco del Río Dulce loop from Aragosa&lt;/a&gt; can take around 6 hours 31 minutes.

Q: Are there any moderate trails suitable for a day hike?
A: Absolutely. Many trails are moderate and ideal for a day hike. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1030772735/pr-gu-08-mandayona-mirabueno-aragosa-trail" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;PR-GU 08: Mandayona - Mirabueno - Aragosa Trail&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 10.3 km path, offering a mix of open terrain and forested sections, typically completed in under 3 hours.

Q: What is the best time of year to go hiking in Las Inviernas?
A: The region's varied landscapes, including river valleys and woodlands, make it suitable for hiking across multiple seasons. Spring and autumn generally offer pleasant temperatures and vibrant scenery. However, trails with moderate elevation changes can be enjoyed throughout much of the year, weather permitting.

Q: How many hikers have explored the Las Inviernas area using komoot?
A: More than 30 hikers have already used komoot to explore the diverse terrain around Las Inviernas, indicating a growing community enjoying the region's outdoor offerings.

Q: Are there any historical sites or landmarks to discover while hiking?
A: Yes, the area is rich in history and natural beauty. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/31505110" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pelegrina Castle – Barranco del Río Dulce loop from Aragosa&lt;/a&gt; passes by historical sites. You can also find the unique &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5443557" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cívica Rock Dwellings&lt;/a&gt;, which are a fascinating point of interest.
tips: Curious and spectacular alignment of natural monoliths, whose name comes from the appearance of being friars peeking through the trees.
